assessorQuestions: ¿Cómo te llamas y dónde has crecido?
¿Cuál es el plato típico más famoso de tu región?
¿Qué tipo de música te gusta y por qué?
¿Tienes ya alguna idea de dónde quieres trabajar al graduarte?
¿Cuál es para ti la habilidad más importante en hostelería?
¿Aprendes español solo en clase o también fuera? ¿Cómo?

data.noTableSituation: Window tables are all occupied until approximately 21:45. Offer the interior section with equally elegant ambiance, or complimentary cocktails at the bar while they wait.

dishOfDay.name: Lubina salvaje al vapor
dishOfDay.ingredients: wild sea bass, fennel, lemon zest, saffron broth
dishOfDay.flavourTexture: delicate and flaky, with a subtle anise note and silky texture

checklist: Greet the guests warmly at the entrance
Check reservation system — identify or seat the guests
If no table available: apologise, give waiting time, suggest alternative
Present the menu and recommend the dish of the day (with description)
Check on guests during the meal
Handle any requests or questions politely

data.requestContext: A guest calls reception to ask if they can have a late check-out until 18:00 (standard check-out is 12:00). The hotel is fully booked the next day and housekeeping needs the room by 13:00 at the absolute latest.
data.reasonForNo: The hotel is at full capacity the following day. Housekeeping must prepare the room for the incoming guest who arrives at 13:00. A 6-hour extension is not possible.
alternatives: Offer luggage storage at no charge until 18:00
Offer access to the hotel spa and lounge until their departure time
Check if a late check-out until 14:00 is possible at an extra charge of €50
checklist: Listen to the guest's request politely without interrupting
Apologise and explain the reason clearly (hotel fully booked)
Say NO politely using formal usted register
Immediately offer at least two concrete alternatives
Confirm the guest's departure time and arrange luggage storage if needed
Thank the guest for their understanding
